---
title: "Fiscal Space Explorer"
subtitle: "Government revenue, spending, and deficit across Indonesian provinces"
date: 2025-05-01
categories: [Public Finance, Interactive, lang:Indonesian]
description: "An interactive comparison of provincial fiscal capacity — own-source revenue, transfer dependence, and fiscal deficit — using DJPK data."
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

Placeholder — replace with your Shiny or Observable embed.
